error_signature: bad request - please check your parameters
title: Jira node returns bad request when updating issue status
symptom: When attempting to update the status of a Jira issue using the Jira node, the response is 'bad request - please check your parameters'. This occurs regardless of using status names or IDs.
applies_when: Using Jira node to update issue status
not_this_if: Using the 'Mark as done' option from the dropdown
root_cause: The error occurs because the Jira API requires a transition ID to change the status of an issue, rather than a status ID or name. The transition ID corresponds to the specific action that moves the issue to a new state.
fix_steps: Identify the correct transition ID for the desired status using the Jira API or documentation.
Use the transition ID in the Jira node configuration instead of the status ID or name.
Save the workflow and test the update again.
agent_instruction: Use the correct transition ID for updating the Jira issue status in the node settings.
